// @ts-ignore TS6133 import { test } from "vitest"; import { Mocker } from "./Mocker.js"; test("mocker", () => { const mocker = new Mocker(); mocker.string; mocker.number; mocker.boolean; mocker.null; mocker.undefined; mocker.stringOptional; mocker.stringNullable; mocker.numberOptional; mocker.numberNullable; mocker.booleanOptional; mocker.booleanNullable; });
